name: Dill Pickle Soup
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Dill pickles, shredded or diced
1 cup White wine or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, melt the butter.
2. Add flour; cook and stir until bubbly.
3. Gradually add the broth.
4. Add the next ingredients: onion, vinegar, croutons (if using), shredded or diced dill pickles, white wine or chicken broth, sugar, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
6. Reduce heat and stir in more flour if desired for thickness.
7. Remove bay leaves, if any.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper, if needed.
9. Garnish with additional croutons before serving.
